---
name: Security or RLS Review
about: Track security, privacy, RLS, or access-control work
title: "security: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Concern

What security/privacy/access issue are we addressing?

## Affected Areas

Tables, APIs, storage buckets, routes, or workflows.

## Expected Behavior

What should be allowed or denied?

## Validation

- [ ] Anonymous access tested
- [ ] Owner/admin access tested
- [ ] Private data not exposed
- [ ] Service role not used client-side
- [ ] Audit logging considered
